title: Remove timer/time display from the app

requirements.summary: Remove all timer and time-related UI elements from the game, including countdown timer display, duration selector buttons (15/30/60/120s), and time-remaining HUD panel. The game should run until all lives are lost, with no timer-based game-over condition.
acceptanceCriteria: No countdown timer is visible anywhere in the HUD during gameplay.
No duration selector (15/30/60/120s toggle buttons) is displayed on the start screen or in the HUD.
The game does not end when a timer reaches zero; the only game-over condition is losing all lives.
All timer-related state variables and logic are removed or disabled in App.tsx.
The HUD still displays Score, Streak Multiplier, Lives, WPM, and Difficulty Level without any time element.
WPM calculation continues to function correctly without a fixed-duration timer (e.g., elapsed time since first keystroke is used internally but not displayed).

file_operations.description: Remove all timer-related state variables (timeRemaining, selectedDuration, etc.), remove duration selector buttons from the start screen, remove countdown timer display from the HUD, remove timer-based game-over logic from the game loop (keep only lives-based game over), and ensure WPM calculation continues to work using elapsed time since first keystroke internally without displaying any timer.
Remove the DurationOption type and any timer-related fields from GameStats or other game-related type definitions that reference time or duration selection.
